rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL OROPEZA VS. BRANDIE OLESEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 13, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL OROPEZA Re-Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And Judgment continued to September 11, 2019. Defendant is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than August 13, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after September 11, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on August 13, 2019. = (501/GLW)
